channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Redistricting debate shifts to South Carolina as Republicans seek clean sweep of US House seats
item.description: A debate over congressional redistricting is shifting to South Carolina. The state House there is to take up debate Monday on legislation that would redraw U.S.

item.title: Talks to end a strike shutting down the largest US commuter rail system will resume Monday
4 crew members eject safely after two Navy jets crash during air show in Idaho
